name: Patrick Murphy
subject: 1.3 MILLION Floridians
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| The upcoming Supreme Court decision could have a terrible impact on millions of Floridians. Friend -- The Florida legislature has **no plan** in place if the Supreme Court strikes down provisions of the _Affordable Care Act_. **They have no plan for the 1.3 million Floridians who are at risk of losing their federal health insurance subsidies.** It's time for the Florida legislature to step up and make a plan to address this potential healthcare crisis in Florida. The Supreme Court could release a decision any day -- and that's why the Florida legislature needs to take action immediately. [**Add your name: Urge the Florida legislature to make a plan for the millions of Florida's children and families who could be affected by the Supreme Court's decision.**](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae27a7/738133e4/3977fa7d/7f9d0c32/1757103335/VEsH/ "http://www.murphyforflorida.com/plan") I hope that the Supreme Court does the right thing. But Florida's families can't rely on hope alone -- they need a plan. Thank you for taking action, Patrick Murphy | **[TAKE ACTION »](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae27a7/738133e4/3977fa7d/7f9d0c32/1757103335/VEsE/ "http://www.murphyforflorida.com/plan")**
---

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Wishing Dads Everywhere a Happy Father's Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cruz for President
body:
Dear Friend,

My father was for me, larger than life, and he still is.

He has always been my hero, and I hope that this new video of his story <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=t7JksVsWv4U> will inspire you. Please watch it here <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=t7JksVsWv4U> and join me in wishing dads everywhere a happy Father's Day!
<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=t7JksVsWv4U>
<http://facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=t7JksVsWv4U> <http://twitter.com/home?status=RT%20and%20join%20%40tedcruz%20in%20wishing%20dads%20everywhere%20a%20%23HappyFathersDay%20https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3Dt7JksVsWv4U>

In the video <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=t7JksVsWv4U>, I introduce my father, Rafael Cruz, and he talks about growing up in Cuba, joining the Cuban Revolution, and his arrest and torture by the Batista government.

My dad shares his story and his profound hope for and belief in American exceptionalism. From an immigrant who could barely speak the language to a son who is a candidate for President of the United States, my father's story <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=t7JksVsWv4U> embodies the promise of America!

For Liberty,
Ted Cruz

P.S. I hope you'll watch and share this new video <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=t7JksVsWv4U> with your Facebook friends <http://facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=t7JksVsWv4U> and Twitter followers <http://twitter.com/home?status=RT%20and%20join%20%40tedcruz%20in%20wishing%20dads%20everywhere%20a%20%23HappyFathersDay%20https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3Dt7JksVsWv4U> and join in wishing dads everywhere a happy Father's Day!

<https://donate.tedcruz.org/c/FO0127/>
Paid for by Cruz for President

www.tedcruz.org
P.O. Box 25376, Houston, TX 77265 | (713) 353-4330

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you no longer wish to receive these emails you may unsubscribe here: http://act.tedcruz.org/UnsubscribePage.html?mkt_unsubscribe=1&mkt_tok=3RkMMJWWfF9wsRonvazAZKXonjHpfsX76%2B0sWKewlMI%2F0ER3fOvrPUfGjI4DTMpnI%2BSLDwEYGJlv6SgFSLHEMaFt3LgJWBg%3D.

name: Rick Santorum
subject: Happy Father's Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016
body:
| [ ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fathersday2015&n=1)
---
Dear Friend --

In my life, I've been an attorney, a member of the House of Representatives, a U.S. Senator representing Pennsylvania, a CEO, and a presidential candidate. But the most important of these, and certainly most rewarding, is a **father**.

This Father's Day, I want to share with you a letter that I have written for my children. I would be honored if you would read it. Today, I encourage you to call your Dad or someone who has been a father figure to you in your life and thank them for their patience, sacrifice, and above all, their unconditional love.

God bless!

\- Rick

* * *

**Stay True to Your Faith and Values**

_To Elizabeth, John, Daniel, Sarah Maria, Peter, Patrick and Isabella
_ When I first became a father, I was filled with awe and a little bit of fear. Nothing really prepares you for that moment. And when we learned your mom was expecting John [our second-born], I couldn’t imagine loving another child as much as I loved Elizabeth. But now with the seven of you, I’ve found that my capacity to love just keeps growing. It has been such a gift to make the sacrificial commitment to live my life not just for myself, but also for your Mom and for all of you. We’ve been through a lot in our family. Mom and I have experienced immense happiness in raising all of you and watching you learn and grow, but we’ve also had to endure some heartbreaking times. Some families break apart with the death of a child or when they have a child with special needs, but we have been so blessed that these challenges have brought us closer together. I have realized that life can be just hours long. And it can be over tomorrow or the next day—you just don’t know. So I know the most important thing for you all is where you spend eternity, not where you spend college. If you want to go to college, great, I will support you. If you want to go to cooking school: great. Or if you want to work on motorcycles, that’s great too. Whatever you want to do is fine with me. I am here to love and support you for the rest of your life, and it is who you are that matters most, not what you do. The biggest piece of fatherly advice that I can give you is that you should stay true to your faith and values. Search for truth and have the courage to stand for it. If you try to live your life consistent with those values and those truths, things have a way of working out in the end. That doesn’t mean you’re not going to go through tough times, to fail or to experience loss. That’s life. But if you can hold on to the values that you know are true, then in the end, everything else will be ok. Love,

Dad

[http://www.ricksantorum.com/](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fathersday2015&n=2)

[ ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/contribute?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fathersday2015&n=3)

Paid for by Santorum for President 2016
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/unsubscribe?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fathersday2015&n=4).
You can also keep up with Rick Santorum for President on [Twitter](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FRickSantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fathersday2015&n=5) or [Facebook](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FRickSantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fathersday2015&n=6).
